common.loginRequired: Please log in to view this page.
common.missingToken: Missing access token. Please log in again.

landing.headline: Organise group activities, <accent>effortlessly</accent>
landing.subtitle: Create groups, plan activities, invite friends — registered or not — and track who's in. All in one place.
landing.featureGroupsDesc: Create groups and add members — search registered users or just enter an email to invite anyone.
landing.featureActivitiesDesc: Schedule activities for your group with date, time, and location. Everyone gets notified.
landing.featureRsvpDesc: Members accept or decline with one click. Admins see the full picture at a glance.

dashboard.groupCount: {count, plural, =0 {No groups} one {1 group} other {# groups}}
dashboard.noOwnedGroups: You don't own any groups yet. Create your first group above.
dashboard.noMemberGroups: You're not a member of any other groups yet.

activityDetail.rsvpDeclined: You have declined this activity. You can change your response until the event starts.
